# MiniYo

> MiniYo (miniyokids.com) is a baby & kids clothing store based in Lebanon.
> It sells soft, thoughtful clothing for newborns, babies, toddlers and kids,
> with delivery across Lebanon and Cash on Delivery. The site is bilingual
> (English / Arabic).

## Storefront

- [Homepage](https://miniyokids.com/): featured categories, new arrivals, sale campaigns
- [Shop all products](https://miniyokids.com/shop): full catalog with filters (gender, category, price, sale)
- [Track order](https://miniyokids.com/track): order status lookup by order number
- [About](https://miniyokids.com/about): brand story
- [FAQ](https://miniyokids.com/faq): delivery, payment, sizing and returns answers
- [Gift guide](https://miniyokids.com/gift-guide): curated newborn and baby-shower gift sets

## Product data

- [Meta catalog feed (CSV)](https://miniyokids.com/meta-feed.csv): full product feed — id (SKU), title, description, price USD, availability, image link, product page link
- [TikTok catalog feed (CSV)](https://miniyokids.com/tiktok-feed.csv): same products with TikTok column names and Google product categories
- Product pages live at `https://miniyokids.com/product/{slug}` and carry OpenGraph product tags plus JSON-LD (price, availability, aggregateRating).

## Policies

- Payment: Cash on Delivery across Lebanon; no card required.
- Delivery: nationwide Lebanon; free delivery on orders over $50.
- Support: WhatsApp (linked in the site footer) and the FAQ page.
- Legal pages (privacy, returns, terms) are linked from the site footer.

## Notes for agents

- Prices are in USD; Cash on Delivery is settled in USD or LBP at delivery.
- Images are served from the images.miniyokids.com CDN (Cloudflare R2) with on-the-fly resizing.
- The storefront is bilingual: most content has English and Arabic variants.
